summary: CV Family & Schooling census — discovery fan-out (geo×subcategory cells, Sonnet workers)
logs: Batch 1: 8 discovery cells (Sonnet 4.6 workers, ~3-4 searches each)...
Batch 1 complete: 8/8 cells returned, 134 raw candidates. Spend so far: 184k tokens
